rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.reason: Source-domain biology (Nepenthes aquaplaning), no LLM defense mechanism; only one content-word substring matches.
Pure biology peristome mechanics paper, unrelated to LLM input filtering.
Activation-velocity-conditioned LLM filter directly realizes PCAP's state-conditioned conditional-activation safety filter.
Multi-agent honeypot routing adversarial LLM requests into deceptive trap responses — same conditional one-way quarantine routing as PCAP.
Honeypot guardrail rewrites dangerous responses into non-executable but theme-preserving outputs — operationally equivalent to PCAP's silent absorption sandbox.
Adversarial-prompt honeypot used for black-box model identification, not silent safety quarantine.
Taxonomy survey of guardrails, not a specific conditional-routing safety mechanism.
LLM-powered honeypot engages attackers in extended trap sessions — same conditional routing into silent quarantine sandbox as PCAP.

fail_reason: Four results (ranks 3, 4, 5, 8) exceed sem>=0.7 and/or func>=0.7 thresholds, covering distinct effect clusters (activation-conditioned filter; honeypot routing; silent safety-rewriting; LLM honeypot sessions). PCAP's combination of conditional activation + one-way routing + silent absorption is already realized in prior LLM-guardrail/honeypot literature, falsifying novelty.
